title: oldenlandia peltospermum
intro: Oldenlandia peltospermum is an herbaceous plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Oldenlandia peltospermum lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of infections and wounds. In traditional herbal preparations, Oldenlandia peltospermum is often used as a decoction, tincture, or powder, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
